title: Golden Horn Goat
description: Gives screaming goats golden horns (and beards) so you can easily identify them
body:
# Golden Horn Goat A Minecraft mod that gives screaming goats golden horns & beards, while keeping the vanilla look. --- ![Screaming Goat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1c3e24fb85489049f154a4190f8c6a5da335f9d.png)
For Resource Pack Creators You can change the texture of the screaming goat by creating a resource pack with this file path: ``` /assets/gloden-horn-goat/textures/entity/goat/screaming_goat.png ``` The texture needs to be named _screaming_goat.png_
(you can change all of the goat's texture not just it's horns)
